name: atvloadly
description: atvloadly is a web service that supports sideloading app on Apple TV. It uses Sideloader⁠ as the underlying technology for sideloading and automatically refreshes the app to ensure its long-term availability.
short_desc: atvloadly is a web service that supports sideloading app on Apple TV. It uses Sideloader⁠ as the underlying technology for sideloading and automatically refreshes the app to ensure its long-term availability.
author: Adelin
